functions.name: export_tables_to_csv
functions.purpose: Exports each of the 8 target tables to a separate CSV file.

parameters.name: export_dir
parameters.description: The base directory where the CSV files will be saved.

parameters.name: run_tag
parameters.description: The run tag to prepend to the output filenames.

returns.description: This function writes files to the filesystem.

functions.name: export_addresses_partitioned
functions.purpose: Exports the Address table into multiple CSV files, one for each settlement.

parameters.name: export_dir
parameters.description: The base directory where the partitioned address folder will be created.

parameters.name: run_tag
parameters.description: The run tag to prepend to the output filenames.

returns.description: This function writes files to the filesystem.
